name: Lottie's Daube Glace 3
recipeIngredient: 1 can (2-1/4 oz.) PITTED BLACK OLIVES (drained and sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove 6 or 8 sprigs of PARSLEY, washed and dried.
2. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours, until the daube is congealed.
To serve:
1. Fill a kitchen sink with a few inches of hot water.
2. Dip pans into the hot water for 30 to 60 seconds.
3. Dry the pans thoroughly.
4. Invert the pans onto a serving platter.
5. Spread a thin layer of mayonnaise on top and sides of the daube.
6. Decorate the sides with sprigs of parsley.
7. Serve with saltine crackers on the side.
8. Cut the daube into bite-sized pieces and place them on the crackers. Enjoy!
